sglang.title: [router][grpc] Simplify model_id determination
sglang.author: CatherineSue
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This PR simplifies the router's model_id handling by removing all path normalization logic.
Justification
When a worker is launched, engine will have a served_model_name defined. It is not worker's responsibility to normalize the id. It should be the same as the engine's.

Modifications

sglang.title: [router] Refactor StopSequenceDecoder to Use Sequence for Incremental Decoding
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Refactored StopSequenceDecoder to delegate incremental token decoding to the Sequence abstraction, eliminating ~40 lines of duplicate logic and simplifying partial stop sequence matching.
The router codebase had duplicate implementations of incremental decoding:

Sequence::append_token()

vllm.title: [BugFix] Work around graph partition x torch.compile cache issue

vllm.title: [Hardware][CPU][PowerPC]Disable torch.compile() in toptopk sampling
vllm.author: Akashcodes732
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
PR #25652 introduced forward_cpu for TopkTopPSampler, which internally uses the argmax operation. On PowerPC systems, running argmax through torch.compile() produces incorrect outputs.
This PR disables forward_cpu for PowerPC and falls back toforward_native instead.
This is a temporary fix while we
